title: Avaris - NBA Betting Analytics Platform
vision: A platform for NBA betting analytics and predictions

success_criteria.description: All foundation features are operational and integrated

features.title: Project Setup and Configuration
features.description: Next.js 15 + React 19 + Python ML environment fully configured

success_criteria.description: All tasks in this milestone are completed

user_stories.title: As a user, I want to be able to view the homepage
user_stories.description: The homepage should display the today's picks with responsive layout

Python ML environment runs XGBoost, Pandas, and nba_api imports

features.title: Team Performance Data Fetching
features.description: Automated fetch of all 30 NBA team statistics with rate limiting

success_criteria.description: Team stats fetching and transformation pipeline is operational with tests

user_stories.title: As a data engineer, I want to fetch NBA team statistics automatically
user_stories.description: The system should fetch all 30 NBA team statistics with proper rate limiting and error handling

acceptance_criteria.description: fetch_team_stats retrieves data for all 30 NBA teams
Exponential backoff retries on API rate limit errors
Team stats are transformed and saved to Parquet format
Unit tests cover fetching and transformation with 80%+ coverage

tasks.description: Implement fetch_team_stats function with exponential backoff
Create data transformation pipeline for team stats to Parquet
Write unit tests for team stats fetching and transformation

features.title: Player Statistics Collection
features.description: Collect key player stats and injury reports for all rostered players

success_criteria.description: Player stats and injury data collection pipeline is operational

user_stories.title: As a data engineer, I want to collect player statistics and injury reports
user_stories.description: The system should collect key player stats and injury reports for all rostered NBA players

acceptance_criteria.description: fetch_player_stats retrieves stats for all rostered players
Injury data is captured and associated with player records
Player data is transformed and stored in Parquet format
Data schema matches TypeScript interfaces defined in FEAT-002

tasks.description: Implement fetch_player_stats function with injury data capture
Create player data transformation and storage in Parquet

features.title: Historical Data Backfill
features.description: Backfill 2022-23 and 2023-24 season data for model training

success_criteria.description: Historical data for 2022-24 seasons is complete and validated

user_stories.title: As a data scientist, I want historical NBA data for model training
user_stories.description: The system should backfill 2022-23 and 2023-24 season data for XGBoost model training

acceptance_criteria.description: Historical data fetcher supports season partitioning (2022-23, 2023-24)
Backfill completes for both seasons without errors
Data completeness validation passes (no missing games)
Data quality checks confirm no corrupt or malformed records

tasks.description: Implement historical game data fetcher with season partitioning
